Common.title: VerifyBusiness - Global Trust, Verified
Common.description: VerifyBusiness is the world's leading platform for business verification, Business Manager verification for Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat and more. Protect your brand identity today.
Common.search: Search a business by name, ID or domain...

Hero.title: Verify Your Business Globally
Hero.subtitle: The most trusted platform for Business Manager verification on Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat & more. Unify your brand across platforms and protect your trademark.

Features.title: Our Services
Features.verification_desc: Get your accounts verified on Facebook, TikTok, Snapchat, and other major platforms. Official Business Manager setup and authentication.
Features.brand_desc: Unify your brand identity across all platforms to prevent trademark theft and impersonation by unauthorized users.
Features.company_desc: Full company registration and setup services in the Middle East, USA, Canada, and England with legal documentation.
Features.whatsapp_desc: Setup your business as an official WhatsApp Business Service Provider with full API integration and Meta App creation.
Features.fraud_desc: Advanced algorithms to detect and report suspicious business activities and protect your brand reputation.
Features.trust_desc: Transparent trust scoring system based on real verification data and customer feedback.

Services.title: Company Establishment Services
Services.subtitle: We help you establish your company legally in key global markets
Services.middle_east_desc: Company formation in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, and other Gulf & MENA countries with full legal compliance.
Services.usa_desc: LLC and Corporation registration across all US states with EIN, bank account setup, and compliance support.
Services.canada_desc: Federal and provincial incorporation with full business registration and compliance documentation.
Services.uk_desc: Limited company registration with Companies House, VAT registration, and business banking setup.

Pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the package that fits your verification needs. All packages are one-time payments.
Pricing.starter_desc: Perfect for businesses looking to verify their presence on the top 3 social platforms.
Pricing.pro_desc: Comprehensive verification across 7 platforms with Meta App & WhatsApp Business setup.

Auth.login_subtitle: Log in to manage your verifications
Auth.join_title: Join the Network of Verified Businesses
Auth.join_subtitle: Build trust with customers and protect your business reputation with the world's most reliable verification platform.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
